videos.title: [지금뉴스] 삼성전자 총파업 D-6…30일 파업 막는 ‘긴급조정권’이란? / KBS 2026.05.15.
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. Samsung Electronics is planning a general strike on the 21st, and there's discussion about the possibility of the government using emergency powers to prevent it.
2. The Minister of Trade, Industry and Energy, Kim Jung-han, stated that as an industry minister, he believes that if a strike occurs, emergency measures will be necessary because semiconductors are the only growth engine for our country's strategic assets.
3. Emergency powers can be activated by the Minister of Labor and Employment when there is a risk of significant harm to the national economy or daily life. If activated, the union must stop all strikes for 30 days, and the government will intervene in mediation and regulation during this period. However, actual cases are rare, with only a few instances such as Hanil Construction Corporation in 1969, Hyundai Motor Company in 1993, Asiana Airlines and Korean Air pilots' strike in 2005, having occurred so far. The most recent case was the Samsung Electronics strike, but there is no precedent of emergency powers being activated before the strike began. Samsung Electronics has reportedly prepared for a strike by reducing semiconductor production and activating emergency measures. If implemented, the potential damage could reach up to 100 trillion won due to the nature of 24-hour semiconductor production lines where even a brief shutdown results in significant losses. The Central Labor Union has requested a post-strike review to be held tomorrow, and the union has stated that they will only negotiate if management first presents concrete proposals on key issues such as abolishing performance-based bonuses, institutionalization, and transparency.

videos.title: 삼성전자 노조 “파업 이후 협의”…파업 D-6, 강 대 강 대치 / KBS  2026.05.15.
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. Samsung Electronics union has announced that the strike, scheduled to start in 6 days, will proceed as planned. They have not agreed to any further negotiations regarding additional adjustments to the collective agreement.
2. The union emphasized that they will stick to their plans for the strike, which is set to begin on June 7th. They have shown a willingness to negotiate after the strike, indicating a post-strike dialogue.
3. The government's mediation efforts are not straightforward due to the need for unanimous agreement among all parties involved. Labor Minister Kim Young-hun has repeatedly emphasized the importance of resolving the issue through dialogue. However, the union has remained silent in response to direct mediation attempts.

videos.title: 삼성전자 노사 협상 교착…파업 강행 가능성 / KBS  2026.05.15.
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. Samsung Electronics proposed a plan for transparency in performance-based pay, but the union is considering discussions only from June 7th onwards, potentially leading to a strike starting May 21st.
2. The union has revealed doubts about the Central Labor Relations Committee's post-meeting adjustments, which could lead to the rejection of the committee's post-meeting restrictions.
3. Samsung's management has initiated open discussions with the union, requesting a change in stance, following the chairman's announcement that they are ready to negotiate without conditions.

videos.title: [현장] "삼성전자 파업하면 경제 마비? 정부가 밝힌 '긴급조정권' 검토의 진실과 1,700개 협력사 운명 걸린 일촉즉발 현상황"
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. 현재, 삼성전자 파업에 대한 긴급조정권이 검토중인 것은 아니며, 노서의 협의가 잘 마무리되기를 바라고 있습니다.
2. 삼성전자는 국민 경제에서 차지하는 비중이나 역할이 크며, 1700개 정도의 협력사가 있어서 파업 같은 상황을 피하고 있습니다.
3. 산업부장관은 각자의 역할을 하고 있으며, 청와대와 주율이 안 된 상태에서 발언이 나온 것은 아닙니다.

videos.title: 삼성전자 파업 전 또...노조 내부 갈등 법적 분쟁 비화 조짐 [지금이뉴스] / YTN
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. 삼성전자의 반도체와 완제품 부문에서 입장이 차이나서 노동조합 내부 갈등이 발생하여, 법적 분쟁으로 비화할 가능성이 있습니다.
2. DX 소속 조합원들은 DS 중심 최대 노조의 대표성을 문제삼고 협상을 중단하려는 가처분 신청을 하였으며, 이를 위해 법무법인을 선정하고 구체적인 요구안을 확정할 계획입니다.
3. DS 조합원들이 파업을 넣고 있는데 반발하여 DX 조합원들은 DS 파업 반대를 프로필에 포함하고 있으며, 이는 초기업 노조가 DS 부문의 성과급 투쟁에만 집중하면서 DX 부문의 요구를 외면한다는 불만을 나타내고 있습니다.
